sentiment: The truest signal is the one that arrives without noise.

stories.title: Noise infusion banned from statistical products published by Census Bureau
stories.summary: The Census Bureau bans noise infusion from official statistical products, choosing transparent data over obfuscated precision.

stories.title: Every Frame Perfect
stories.summary: Tonsky argues for pixel-perfect rendering — every frame should be precisely right, not approximately close.

stories.title: GLM 5.2 Is Out
stories.summary: A new open-weight language model release continues the trend of rapidly advancing open AI capabilities.
